name: Chicken Marinade
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boned and skinned chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the chicken in a bowl.
2. Place the chicken in the marinade and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
3. Grill the marinated chicken for 10-12 minutes, turning once, until no longer pink and juices run clear.
